title: Create Ars Nouveau
description: In a world where gears meet glyphs, Create Ars Compact bridges the machinery of Create with the magic of Ars Nouveau.
body:
In a world where gears meet glyphs, Create Ars Compact bridges the machinery of Create with the magic of Ars Nouveau.

At its heart is the Sorcerer Blaze Burner, a mystical burner forged from a Blaze Burner or Sorcerer Cage using a Source Engine. Instead of coal or blaze fuel, it feeds on pure Source, turning magical energy into mechanical heat for mixers, compactors, basins, and boilers.

With Source Tubes, the burner grows stronger. Each tube expands its Source capacity, letting it rise from a quiet magical flame to a heated forge, and finally into a superheated arcane engine.

Create Ars Compact turns Source into power, magic into motion, and machinery into sorcery.
